name: Profile_R5_SubscriptionStatus_R4
title: Cross-version Profile for R5.SubscriptionStatus resource for use in FHIR R4
description: This cross-version profile allows R5 SubscriptionStatus resource content to be represented via FHIR R4 Basic resources.

element.short: Cross-version Profile for R5.SubscriptionStatus resource for use in FHIR R4
element.definition: This cross-version profile allows R5 SubscriptionStatus resource content to be represented via FHIR R4 Basic resources.

element.short: R5: requested | active | error | off | entered-in-error (new)
element.comment:
Element `SubscriptionStatus.status` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `SubscriptionStatus` is not mapped.
Element `SubscriptionStatus.status` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Events since the Subscription was created (new)
element.comment:
Element `SubscriptionStatus.eventsSinceSubscriptionStart` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `SubscriptionStatus` is not mapped.
Element `SubscriptionStatus.eventsSinceSubscriptionStart` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Detailed information about any events relevant to this notification (new)
element.comment:
Element `SubscriptionStatus.notificationEvent` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `SubscriptionStatus` is not mapped.
Element `SubscriptionStatus.notificationEvent` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Reference to the Subscription responsible for this notification (new)
element.comment:
Element `SubscriptionStatus.subscription` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `SubscriptionStatus` is not mapped.
Element `SubscriptionStatus.subscription` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Reference to the SubscriptionTopic this notification relates to (new)
element.comment:
Element `SubscriptionStatus.topic` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `SubscriptionStatus` is not mapped.
Element `SubscriptionStatus.topic` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
This value SHOULD NOT be present when using `empty` payloads, MAY be present when using `id-only` payloads, and SHOULD be present when using `full-resource` payloads.

element.short: R5: List of errors on the subscription (new)
element.comment:
Element `SubscriptionStatus.error` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `SubscriptionStatus` is not mapped.
Element `SubscriptionStatus.error` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
Recommended practice: clear errors when status is updated.

element.short: R5: handshake | heartbeat | event-notification | query-status | query-event (new)
element.comment:
Element `SubscriptionStatus.type` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `SubscriptionStatus` is not mapped.
Element `SubscriptionStatus.type` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
